message:
fix: workspace annotation, absolute test paths, remove teaching-to-test

- Add "snapshot taken at session start" annotation to workspace section
- Change test file label from "run these to verify" to just "Test files:"
- Render test file paths as absolute (prepend working dir)

The "run these to verify your work" label taught the agent to run
specific test files rather than deciding what to verify based on the
task. The snapshot annotation prevents the agent from expecting the
workspace listing to reflect its changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
